name: TOP_ORIGIN_BY_CAGR_5Y
description: Top origin by cagr 5y. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year, $years AS recent_years
WITH max_year, recent_years, max_year - recent_years + 1 AS base_year
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= base_year AND y.year <= max_year
WITH a, base_year, max_year,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN y.year = base_year THEN p END) AS base_count,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN y.year = max_year THEN p END) AS last_count
WHERE base_count > 0 AND last_count > 0 AND max_year > base_year
RETURN a.name AS assignee,
       base_count,
       last_count,
       ((1.0 * last_count) / base_count) ^ (1.0 / (max_year - base_year)) - 1.0 AS cagr
ORDER BY cagr DESC, last_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Within the China origin group, which organizations or individuals have the highest five-year compound annual growth rate in patent filings?
Within the US origin group, which organizations or individuals have the highest five-year compound annual growth rate in patent filings?
Within the Personal origin group, which organizations or individuals have the highest five-year compound annual growth rate in patent filings?
